title: Implement Tuple-Based Account Uniqueness and Contextual Display
execution_steps: Step 1: Update Room AccountEntity to use composite unique index (name, currency_code, owner_label).
Step 2: Update FinanceRepository and SettingsViewModel unique constraint check logic for Accounts.
Step 3: Update Account mapping logic for UI display across all specified view models (Timeline, Dashboard, Settings, New Transaction).
definition_of_done: Composite unique index correctly prevents duplicate account creation at DB level.
UI correctly differentiates account display formats across contexts as specified in FR-022.
All unit and UI tests pass.
